hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|css|html|yaml|yml)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 2; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env(\..+)?$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -qvF '.env.example' && echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit .env files - constraint #8 in CLAUDE.md' && exit 2 || exit 0
